category_sources: source_facts.description says "PDF Command-line Tools"; official Coherent PDF manual is for command-line PDF tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cpdf; official repository and manual refer to the cpdf command-line tool.
docs_sources: Official Coherent PDF user manual is a dedicated documentation PDF; official GitHub README is the source repository documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/johnwhitington/cpdf-source; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PDF command-line tools; official manual title is Coherent PDF Command Line Tools User Manual.
